meaning: adj.未被发现的,未被识破的
examples: The spy ring had a fifth member as yet still undetected.
How could anyone break into the palace undetected?
They managed to get away from the coast undetected.
That is only natural after years in which anomalies have been left undetected or even concealed.
Subtle, undetected slippages in trust--not just big, one-off gaffes--can do plenty of damage, too.
